description: Mosharekat (مشارکت, 'Participation') was the newspaper of the Islamic Iran Participation Front — the party of Mohammad Reza Khatami, brother of President Khatami. Closed without stated justification on 27 April 2000, simultaneously with [Sobh-e Emroz](/orgs/sobh-e-emroz-newspaper), as part of the mass April 2000 crackdown following the reformists' parliamentary election landslide.
